ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "is_student" INTEGER /* Flag determining if the individual is a student */,
  "may_not_graduate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the student may not graduate */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Interest level on a scale (1-5) */,
  "social_status" INTEGER /* Whether the student prefers to participate alone */,
  "sign_up_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student signed up for events online */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student attending the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the student attended */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the student attended the event */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of attendance */,
  "check_in_method" TEXT /* Method of check-in (e.g., manual, QR code) */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "max_attendance" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., academic, social, cultural) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the event (e.g., freshmen, seniors) */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if registration is required */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student related to the interest */,
  "interest_description" TEXT /* Description of the specific interest */,
  "interest_category" TEXT /* Category of the interest (e.g., academic, hobby) */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Interest level on a scale (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the advisor works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the advisor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student assigned to the advisor */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the student */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was assigned to the advisor */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., academic, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student related to the graduation status */,
  "graduation_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for graduation (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high') */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the student's status */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Specific risk factors (e.g., low GPA, missed classes) */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan to mitigate risks */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_status_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sign_up_logs" (
  "sign_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sign-up activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who signed up */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the student signed up for */,
  "sign_up_date" TEXT /* Date when the student signed up */,
  "sign_up_method" TEXT /* Method of sign-up (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "confirmation_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a confirmation email was sent */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date when the confirmation was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sign_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_up_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_up_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feedback is public */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
